barRaise.topFinding: The label engine is healthy and the regression that defined the last three reviews is over: the nine-file diff that sat uncommitted across two review boundaries shipped in v0.18.2 (81907ca, 2026-06-13), so the storage-error surfacing feature, the release.ps1 clean-tree guard, and the comment sweep are all committed and the working tree is clean. The 06-13 HIGH closed without a new one opening. What is left is the same infrastructure-and-decision perimeter that keeps re-printing because nobody closes it with a decision: a 1020 MB .git from retired ingredient-PNG history, a dashboard JSON whose audit pointer and herb metric have drifted, the cross-ID work-queue split, and a 98%-complete tool still on a daily lens cadence. The single highest-leverage move is to cut v1.0, make the .git and cadence calls, and drop Apothecary to weekly review so the loop stops generating findings faster than they drain.
